title: B Site Smoke from T Spawn
summary: Standard B site smoke thrown from T spawn to block CT vision

position.caption: Stand at the left corner of T spawn

aim.caption: Aim at the antenna above B doors

effect.caption: Smoke lands on CT side of B site

position: Go to T spawn left corner
Align your body with the wall edge
aim: Look up at the edge of the B-site rooftop
Align crosshair with the antenna tip
Keep crosshair slightly left of center

text: Left click throw while standing still

title: A Site CT Smoke from T Spawn
summary: Blocks CT position on A site from T spawn area

position.caption: Stand at the corner near T ramp

aim.caption: Aim at the tip of the crane

effect.caption: Smoke lands on CT on A site

position: Stand at the right side wall corner
aim: Look up towards the crane structure
Align crosshair with the very tip of crane arm
Fine-tune slightly right

text: Jump and release left click simultaneously

title: Mid Window Smoke from T Spawn
summary: Smokes the window room to allow safe mid crossing

position: Stand against the right door frame
aim: Look up at the left edge of the window room opening
Crosshair on the overhanging beam
Keep it steady

title: CT Flash from Long A
summary: Pop flash over the long A corner to blind CTs holding on site

aim.caption: Aim just above the wall edge

position: Push to long A corner (the pit edge)
Hug the right side of the wall
aim: Look up and slightly right
Aim just above the corner wall edge
The flash should go over the wall

text: Right-click for a shorter throw distance
The flash will pop behind the wall
throw.timingNote: Use when teammates are ready to push

title: B Site Molotov from T Ramp
summary: Molotov to clear default B plant position from tunnel entry

position.caption: Stand at the tunnel exit towards B site

aim.caption: Aim at the top right of the B site box

effect.caption: Default plant position is on fire

position: Stand at the first pillar on the right
aim: Look at the top edge of the large crate on site
Aim slightly above it to lob over

text: Molotov will arc over the crate and land on plant spot

title: Long A Smoke from Catwalk
summary: Smoke covers the long A pit position from catwalk

position.caption: Position on catwalk near the railing

aim.caption: Aim at the corner of the rooftop

position: Stand right next to the railing post
aim: Look at the rooftop on the long A building
Crosshair on the far right corner of the roof edge
Very precise alignment needed

text: Bind +jump to a key for consistency
throw.timingNote: Do this before rotating to long

title: Catwalk Flash for Mid Crossing
summary: Flash to blind CTs watching mid from catwalk side

position.caption: Stand at mid doors right side

aim.caption: Aim at the sky above catwalk

position: Go to mid doors right side
aim: Look up at approximately 70 degrees
Aim above the catwalk opening
Flash should fly over and pop behind

text: Walk forward slightly as you throw

title: A Short HE Grenade
summary: HE grenade thrown to A short to damage incoming T-side players

position.caption: CT position near A site default

aim.caption: Aim at the short corner entrance wall

effect.caption: HE damages players at short entrance

position: Start at default CT A site position
Stand at the back of the platform
aim: Aim at the wall just above the short entrance door
Crosshair on the top edge of the entrance archway

text: The grenade bounces off the wall into short
throw.timingNote: Throw when you hear T side footsteps

title: B Doors Smoke from CT
summary: CT smoke for B doors to prevent B tunnel rush

position.caption: Stand near B site default plant

aim.caption: Aim at the top of B doors frame

position: Take CT B site default position
aim: Look up at B doors top frame
Align with the horizontal beam above doors
Keep crosshair slightly left

title: Upper Tunnels Smoke from T Spawn
summary: Smokes the entrance to upper tunnels from T spawn area

position.caption: Stand at the T spawn box corner

aim.caption: Aim above the tunnel entrance archway

position: Stand at the far box in spawn
aim: Look up and to the left
Aim above the arch of the tunnel entrance
Small adjustment needed per run

text: Make sure you have a full run-up stopped before throwing
throw.timingNote: Use at the start of the round to block rotations
